a16z.name: Andreessen Horowitz
a16z.description: Venture capital firm founded by Marc Andreessen and Ben Horowitz. Backs bold founders building category-defining technology companies.

sequoia.name: Sequoia Capital
sequoia.description: Helps daring founders build legendary companies from idea to IPO and beyond.

yc.name: Y Combinator
yc.description: Seed-stage accelerator. Twice a year, invests in a large number of startups.

accel.name: Accel
accel.description: Global venture capital firm that partners with exceptional founders from seed through growth.

ivp.name: IVP
ivp.description: Late-stage venture capital and growth equity firm.

index-ventures.name: Index Ventures
index-ventures.description: Global venture capital firm partnering with founders from seed through growth.

spark.name: Spark Capital
spark.description: Early and growth-stage venture fund based in San Francisco and Boston.

felicis.name: Felicis Ventures
felicis.description: Venture capital firm investing in iconic companies reinventing core markets.

lightspeed.name: Lightspeed Venture Partners
lightspeed.description: Global venture capital firm focused on enterprise, consumer, and health technology.

general-catalyst.name: General Catalyst
general-catalyst.description: Venture capital firm that invests in powerful, positive change.

776.name: Seven Seven Six
776.description: Venture capital firm founded by Alexis Ohanian. Backs founders reimagining communities, commerce, and culture.

thrive.name: Thrive Capital
thrive.description: Investment firm built to support the best technology companies at every stage.

qumra-capital.name: Qumra Capital
qumra-capital.description: Israeli growth-stage venture capital firm focused on exceptional technology companies scaling to global leadership.

shine-capital.name: Shine Capital
shine-capital.description: Early-stage venture capital firm backing creative, convincing, and relentless entrepreneurs.
